data.title: California Water Service Completes Acquisition Of Palm Mutual Water Company
data.description: California Water Service (Cal Water) has successfully acquired Palm Mutual Water Company's water system assets in a deal that was agreed upon in May 2025 and recently approved by the California Public Utilities Commission. Based in San Jose, this acquisition now allows Cal Water to serve the customers previously under Palm Mutual in the Bakersfield District. The completion of this purchase marks a significant step for Cal Water, as it takes over serving approximately [insert number] customers in the region.

data.title: Actelis Networks Secures $0.85 Million Software and Services Renewal from Leading North American Carrier
data.description: The customer's extensive critical network, spanning multiple states, will receive maintenance services, disaster-readiness support, and upgraded, cyber-hardened, and modernized Meta-Assist element management software as part of the renewal.

data.title: Occidental to Announce Second Quarter Results Wednesday, August 5, 2026; Hold Conference Call Thursday, August 6, 2026
data.description: On July 1, 2026, Occidental (NYSE: OXY) confirmed it will reveal its financial performance for the second quarter of 2026 after markets close on August 5, 2026. A conference call is scheduled for August 6, 2026, at 1 p.m. Eastern/12 p.m. Central to analyze the results.

data.title: Festi hf.: Notification regarding execution of a buyback program
data.description: During the Annual General Meeting of Festi hf. on March 5, 2026, shareholders approved the Board of Directors, following Article 55 of the Act on Public Limited Companies No. 2/1995, to buy back a maximum of 10% of the company's issued share capital. These buybacks aim to decrease the company's share capital and fulfill commitments related to stock option agreements with employees.

data.title: AH Realty Trust to Report Second Quarter Earnings on August 3rd
data.description: The company is scheduled to review its financial performance for the second quarter on August 4th. This event will focus on key metrics such as revenue, profit margins, and growth figures. Investors and analysts are eagerly awaiting this disclosure, as it will provide insights into the company's operations and future prospects. The discussion will cover various aspects, including sales numbers, expenses, and any significant developments that impacted the organization during the quarter. Stay tuned for a detailed analysis of the company's performance in the second quarter on August 4th.

data.title: Wabash Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: In Lafayette, Indiana, on July 1, 2026, Wabash (NYSE: WNC) disclosed its plan to webcast the quarterly earnings conference call. This call aims to examine and deliberate on the financial outcomes of the company for the second quarter of 2026. The event is scheduled for Wednesday, July 29, 2026, starting at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: Centerspace Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date
data.description: In Minneapolis on July 1, 2026, Centerspace (NYSE: CSR) announced that it will unveil its performance data for the quarter concluding on June 30, 2026, post-market closure on Monday, August 3, 2026. The company's management has scheduled a conference call to analyze these results on Tuesday, August 4, 2026, starting at 10:00 AM.

data.title: COMSTOCK RESOURCES, INC. ANNOUNCES SECOND QUARTER 2026 EARNINGS DATE AND CONFERENCE CALL INFORMATION
data.description: Comstock Resources, Inc. (NYSE: CRK) is scheduled to announce its second quarter 2026 financial results on July 29, 2026, following the market closure. The company will hold a conference call on July 30, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. CT to discuss the outcomes of the second quarter.

data.title: Trump profited from a memecoin as many investors took losses: hundreds of thousands impacted financially.
data.description: The memecoin created substantial losses for hundreds of thousands of investors while providing significant financial gains for President Trump and his family.

data.title: CooperSurgical Supports Saving Mothers to Help Advance Global Women’s Health and Raise Awareness
data.description: CooperSurgical, a company based in Trumbull, Connecticut, is backing Saving Mothers in their efforts to promote women's health worldwide and increase awareness around the issue. The collaboration aims to make a positive impact on global women's health with a focus on supporting initiatives that improve maternal mortality rates and access to healthcare. CooperSurgical's partnership with Saving Mothers underscores their commitment to empowering women and advocating for their well-being.

data.title: Verisign to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: VeriSign, Inc., a leading global provider of internet infrastructure and domain name registry services, revealed that its live earnings teleconference for Q2 2026 is scheduled for Thursday, July 23, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. (EDT). The earnings news will be released to wire services around 4:05 p.m. (EDT) on the same day and can also be accessed on the company's website at https://investor.verisign.com. VeriSign is listed on NASDAQ as VRSN.

data.title: Zeta Global to Participate in Upcoming Investor Event to Unveil Evolving AI Strategy
data.description: A company based in New York, Zeta Global, is set to take part in an upcoming investor event where they will reveal their advancing artificial intelligence (AI) strategy. The event aims to highlight Zeta Global's commitment to incorporating AI technology into their operations. This signifies the company's dedication to innovation and staying at the forefront of technological advancements. The event is expected to attract a significant number of investors interested in learning more about Zeta Global's AI strategy and its potential impact on the company's future growth.

data.title: AppLovin to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: AppLovin Corporation, a prominent marketing platform (NASDAQ: APP), is set to release its financial results for the second quarter of 2026 on August 5, 2026, after the U.S. stock market closes. Following this, a webinar will be held at 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET on the same day for management to discuss the quarterly results and offer insights on business performance.
Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan and mizuho expected to be included in the lending consortium - sources. $JPM $GS

data.title: Corgi Cafe Opens Second Location at Atlanta Tech Village, Expanding Beyond San Francisco
data.description: Corgi Insurance has introduced the second branch of its founder-focused 24/7 builder café in Atlanta, on July 1, 2026. This move expands the café's presence to one of the Southeast's biggest startup hubs. The café caters to founders and engineers in the area, providing them with a community-driven space to collaborate and connect.

data.title: The Leon Levine Foundation Awards $2.8 Million to Expand Maternal Healthcare Access in North Carolina's Maternity Care Deserts
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on July 1, 2026, it was reported that maternity care shortages are on the rise in rural areas of the state and the country. The Leon Levine Foundation has pledged $2.8 million to support the introduction of a new healthcare approach focused on providing prenatal and postpartum care.

data.title: Grid Dynamics to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on July 30th
data.description: Grid Dynamics Holdings, Inc., a leading AI transformation partner for Fortune 1000 companies, is set to conduct a video conference call on Thursday, July 30, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. ET to review its financial performance for the second quarter of 2026. The company, listed as Nasdaq: GDYN, will release a press statement with the results on their website before the call. The video conference will be webcasted, and a replay will be accessible post-event.

data.title: XAI Floating Rate & Alternative Income Trust Declares its Monthly Common Shares Distribution of $0.225 per Share
data.description: On July 1, 2026, XAI Floating Rate & Alternative Income Trust announced a monthly distribution of $0.225 per share for its common shares (XFLT), with the payment scheduled for August 3, 2026. Shareholders as of July 15, 2026, will receive this distribution, which is consistent with the previous month's payout of $0.225 per share. This demonstrates stability in the Trust's distribution policy.

data.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. Confirms July 2026 Common Share and Q3 2026 Series C Preferred Share Dividends
data.description: In VERO BEACH, Florida, on July 01, 2026, ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. (NYSE: ARR and ARR-PRC) announced the confirmation of the July 2026 cash dividend for its Common Stock, aligning with the guidance issued on June 24, 2026. The Company also verified the Q3 2026 monthly cash dividend rate for its Series C Preferred Stock, ensuring consistency in their dividend payouts. This news highlights the Company's commitment to providing returns to its investors through dividends, further solidifying its position in the market.

data.title: Third Coast Bancshares, Inc. Announces 2026 Second Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call Schedule
data.description: Third Coast Bancshares, Inc., the parent company of Third Coast Bank, will release its financial results for the second quarter of 2026 on July 22, 2026, after the market closes. The company's stock is listed on both NYSE and NYSE Texas under the ticker symbol TCBX. This announcement was made in Houston on July 1, 2026. Stay tuned for the numbers and insights about Third Coast's performance in the second quarter of this year.
